title: Update .env.example with all payment-related environment variables
acceptance_criteria: A clearly labelled '# Payment (Razorpay — India UPI)' section is added to .env.example

Section contains all of these variables with inline comments: RAZORPAY_KEY_ID (comment: 'Razorpay Key ID — SAFE to expose to frontend / Checkout widget'), RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET (comment: 'Razorpay Key Secret — SERVER-ONLY, never expose to frontend or logs'), RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET (comment: 'Razorpay Webhook Signing Secret — SERVER-ONLY'), RAZORPAY_MONTHLY_PASS_PRICE_PAISE (comment: 'Monthly access pass price in Indian paise. e.g. 99900 = ₹999'), RAZORPAY_CREDITS_PACK_50_PRICE_PAISE (comment: '50-credit pack price in paise. e.g. 49900 = ₹499'), RAZORPAY_CREDITS_PACK_200_PRICE_PAISE (comment: '200-credit pack price in paise. e.g. 149900 = ₹1499'), GEOLOCATION_API_URL (comment: 'Geolocation endpoint. Default: https://ip-api.com/json — free tier, 45 req/min. Self-hosted MaxMind proxy can be substituted.')
A note is added above the section: '# Set RAZORPAY_KEY_ID to enable payment mode. Omit it (or leave blank) for free/open access (dev mode).'
All pre-existing variables in .env.example are preserved unchanged.
No actual key values are present — all values are empty (VAR=) or example placeholders (VAR=rzp_test_XXXX)
output_format: the .env.example diff only, plus a note confirming no secrets are present in the committed file
